description: This file is a shell script (migrate.sh) that automates database schema migrations for a PostgreSQL database, applying SQL migration files in order, tracking applied migrations, and supporting reapplication and error handling.

methods.name: apply_migration
methods.description: Function to apply individual SQL migration files, handle reapplication, and record migration status.

calls: ${CONN_CMD} -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS schema_migrations ..."
